name: link
description: LINK / Obsidian Sync — owns /v1/config/link/* routes (status, run-now, secrets, test-ping, import-vault-folder) AND the LINK watchdog worker (final leg of the ContextGenerator pipeline). The vault sync engine library lives at ./vault/sync.ts; the context-generator module's sorter chains into it via cross-module require. Worker lifecycle is registered with ctx.workers.add() so disable / reload clears the 5-min interval cleanly.
